text: All  subcontractors  will  provide  to  the  Contractor  a  copy  of  their  Safety  Program  to  include Hazardous  Communication  Program  with  all  applicable  Material  Safety  Data  Sheets  for  any chemicals that will be used on the specific project.  Your company will also need to turn in a copy of any other safety-related licenses, programs and training certificates from your company as well.
